steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: In $$K(v)=\frac{5}{2}v^2$$, the input $$v$$ is the object's speed in meters per second, and the output $$K(v)$$ is kinetic energy in joules.

steps.title: Interpret the notation
steps.content: The statement $K(18)=810$ means that when the speed is $18$ meters per second, the kinetic energy is $810$ joules.

steps.title: Match the context statement
steps.content: The matching interpretation is that the object traveling at $18$ meters per second has a kinetic energy of $810$ joules. The answer is A.
